contentBlocks.title: Why use a Lorem Ipsum generator?
contentBlocks.html:
Lorem Ipsum is the standard placeholder text used in graphic design and on websites. The text comes from De Finibus Bonorum et Malorum (On the Ends of Good and Evil), written by Marcus Tullius Cicero in 45 BC. The original passage was deliberately altered - words were added, removed and rearranged - so that the text has no meaning, but keeps a natural rhythm and letter distribution close to a real language.

A generator is useful whenever a layout has to be presented or tested but the final copy is not ready yet - for example for website mockups, UI prototypes or graphic design projects. The tool creates paragraphs, sentences or words in 8 styles.

Further down you will also find a classic, ready-to-copy Lorem Ipsum paragraph, a table with the meaning of the most common words, and guidance on inserting this text in popular programs.

contentBlocks.title: Copy the classic Lorem Ipsum text without generating anything
contentBlocks.html:
This is the most widely copied placeholder paragraph on the internet - the same passage has shipped by default in Word, Adobe InDesign and countless design templates for decades:

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua. Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation ullamco laboris nisi ut aliquip ex ea commodo consequat. Duis aute irure dolor in reprehenderit in voluptate velit esse cillum dolore eu fugiat nulla pariatur. Excepteur sint occaecat cupidatat non proident, sunt in culpa qui officia deserunt mollit anim id est laborum.

Need more text than this one paragraph? Use the generator above - choose the number of paragraphs, sentences or words and copy exactly the amount you need, instead of repeating this same passage by hand.

contentBlocks.title: Where does Lorem Ipsum come from? History from Cicero to today
contentBlocks.html:
Lorem Ipsum is over 2,000 years old. The original passage comes from section 1.10.32 of De Finibus Bonorum et Malorum by Cicero, written in 45 BC. The work is a philosophical treatise on ethics - Cicero analysed hedonism and stoicism, arguing for a balanced approach to pleasure and pain.

Using this text as filler in printing dates to around the year 1500, when an unidentified printer used Cicero's passage to create a type specimen book. The text survived five centuries, passing through the eras of hand typesetting, Linotype and phototypesetting.

The modern popularity of Lorem Ipsum began in the 1960s, when Letraset put the text on transfer-lettering sheets used in graphic studios. The decisive breakthrough came in 1985, when Aldus Corporation built Lorem Ipsum into PageMaker as its default placeholder text - one of the first desktop publishing programs. From that moment on, Lorem Ipsum became the industry standard.

Richard McClintock, a Latin professor at Hampden-Sydney College in Virginia, identified the source of the text in the 1980s, discovering that the words lorem ipsum are a corrupted fragment of Latin from Cicero's work. His research confirmed that Lorem Ipsum is not a random string of words but has genuine literary roots.

contentBlocks.title: What do the words in Lorem Ipsum dolor sit amet mean?
contentBlocks.html:
The Lorem Ipsum text is deliberately scrambled - it is not a grammatically correct Latin sentence, so it cannot be translated as a whole. The individual words, however, come from real Latin and have documented meanings or etymological roots:

WordMeaning / origin
LoremNot a standalone word - it is the trailing fragment of "dolorem" (a form of "dolor", pain).
IpsumFrom "ipse" - itself, the very same.
DolorPain, suffering.
SitIs, let it be (from "esse", to be).
AmetFrom "amare" - to love, to like.
ConsecteturA distorted form related to "consequi" - to follow, to pursue.
AdipiscingFrom "adipisci" - to attain, to strive for.
ElitThe trailing fragment of "velit" (would want, a form of "velle", to want).

That is where the popular, tongue-in-cheek "translation" of the opening words as "pain itself" (dolorem ipsum) comes from - but that is an interpretation of isolated fragments pulled from a longer, scrambled text, not a translation of the whole sentence, which makes no sense in Latin.

contentBlocks.title: When to use Lorem Ipsum, and when to use real text?
contentBlocks.html:
Lorem Ipsum works well wherever content is not yet ready but a layout needs to be presented or tested:

  • UI prototypes and wireframes - designing page or app structure without waiting for final copy from the client.
  • Graphic mockups - presenting a design with realistic-looking text instead of empty rectangles.
  • Font and typography testing - evaluating readability, line height, kerning and heading hierarchy on a real block of text.
  • CMS templates and themes - demonstrating how a WordPress, Shopify or other CMS template looks with sample content.
  • Print materials - flyers, brochures, business cards and catalogues during the design phase.

When NOT to use Lorem Ipsum:

  • Live websites - Google indexes placeholder text and may treat the page as low quality. Publishing lorem ipsum harms SEO.
  • Final SEO copy - meta titles, meta descriptions and H1 headings need real keywords, not filler.
  • Email marketing - sending messages with lorem ipsum looks unprofessional and risks landing in spam.
  • Usability testing with real users - users focus on the content. Placeholder text skews UX research results.

contentBlocks.title: How to insert Lorem Ipsum in popular programs?
contentBlocks.description: Some programs have their own built-in way of inserting placeholder text:

items.title: Microsoft Word
items.description: Type =lorem() in a document and press Enter - Word inserts the standard Lorem Ipsum paragraph. Typing =lorem(3,2) inserts 3 paragraphs of 2 sentences each.

items.title: Adobe InDesign
items.description: From the Type menu, choose Fill with Placeholder Text to automatically fill a text frame with placeholder copy.

items.title: Websites, HTML and code
items.description: The generator produces clean text with no HTML markup, so you can paste it straight into your code, a JSON test file or an editor like VS Code - there is nothing to strip out.

items.title: Figma, Google Docs and others
items.description: These tools do not have a built-in Lorem Ipsum feature - they need a plugin or add-on, or text pasted in from elsewhere. Our generator works instantly in the browser, with nothing to install.

items.title: Design students

contentBlocks.title: How do the available placeholder text styles in our generator differ?
What placeholder text styles will you find in the generator?
contentBlocks.html:
Our generator offers 8 unique placeholder text styles - from classical Latin to legal jargon. Each style has its own bank of 90+ words and generates text with a natural rhythm:

  • Lorem Ipsum - the classic Latin placeholder text from Cicero's work. The industry standard for over 500 years.
  • Hipster Ipsum - hipster culture vocabulary: craft, avocado, vintage, mindfulness. Ideal for lifestyle projects.
  • Business Ipsum - corporate jargon: synergy, leverage, stakeholder, KPI. For presentation decks and corporate website mockups.
  • English filler - random English words from various fields. Shows the client what the text will actually look like in the project.
  • Bacon Ipsum - meat and grilling vocabulary: steak, brisket, barbecue. Popular among developers.
  • Cupcake Ipsum - bakery vocabulary: muffin, chocolate, caramel, frosting. For food and hospitality projects.
  • Pirate Ipsum - pirate-themed text: ahoy, treasure, galleon, rum. For entertainment and game projects.
  • Legal Ipsum - legal terminology: jurisdiction, plaintiff, statute, liability. For law firm website mockups.

The fun variants (Bacon, Cupcake, Pirate) work well in internal presentations and projects where humour improves team communication. For professional client presentations, use classic Lorem Ipsum or Legal Ipsum instead - they stay neutral and don't distract from the design.

English filler is a distinctive option in our generator - it draws on its own word bank to keep the letter proportions and word lengths natural for English. Pick this style when you want to show a client a realistic preview of the text in the project.

contentBlocks.title: Does publishing Lorem Ipsum harm SEO?
contentBlocks.html:
Yes - publishing Lorem Ipsum on a live website can negatively affect search rankings. Google analyses the content of every indexed page and recognises placeholder text. Here is why that is a problem:

  • Thin content - a page with placeholder text offers no value to visitors. Google classifies such pages as "thin content" and ranks them lower.
  • Junk indexing - Google's crawlers index Lorem Ipsum as page content. It can surface in search results, which affects brand perception.
  • Wasted crawl budget - Google allocates a limited crawl budget to every site. Pages full of lorem ipsum consume that budget with no benefit.

How to avoid the problem: before publishing, search your entire site for the phrase "lorem ipsum" or "dolor sit amet". In Google Search Console, check that no indexed page still contains placeholder text. Use the command site:yourdomain.com "lorem ipsum" in Google search.

The Lorem Ipsum Generator is a tool for the design phase. Placeholder text should always be replaced with real content before a page goes live.

contentBlocks.title: Frequently asked questions about the Lorem Ipsum Generator

items.question: What is Lorem Ipsum?
items.answer: Lorem Ipsum is the standard placeholder text used in the printing, graphic design and web development industries. It fills a layout with realistic-looking text when the final content is not ready yet. The text has a natural rhythm and letter distribution similar to real language, which makes a design look credible.
items.answerSchemaText: Lorem Ipsum is the standard placeholder text used in the printing, graphic design and web development industries.

items.question: How do you make Lorem Ipsum?
items.answer: The easiest way is to use the generator above: choose paragraphs, sentences or words, set the count, pick a text style and click Generate. The text appears instantly and you can copy it to clipboard or download it as a .txt file. Some programs (such as Microsoft Word) also have their own built-in shortcut for inserting Lorem Ipsum.
items.answerSchemaText: Choose a mode and count in the generator above, click Generate, then copy the result.

items.question: What is the full text of classic Lorem Ipsum?
items.answer: The most widely used version is one paragraph starting with Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit - you'll find it ready to copy in the section above. There is no single, official longer version - most generators (including this one) create additional text from the same word bank, so for an exact length it's better to ask the generator than to look for a ready-made, longer text.
items.answerSchemaText: The most popular version is one paragraph starting with Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet - available in the section above.

items.question: Where does the Lorem Ipsum text come from?
items.answer: Lorem Ipsum comes from De Finibus Bonorum et Malorum (On the Ends of Good and Evil), written by Marcus Tullius Cicero in 45 BC. It is a philosophical treatise on ethics. The original passage from section 1.10.32 was deliberately altered by an unidentified printer in the 16th century - words were added, removed and rearranged so that the text had no meaning but kept the natural look of Latin.
items.answerSchemaText: Lorem Ipsum comes from De Finibus Bonorum et Malorum by Cicero, written in 45 BC.

items.question: Is Lorem Ipsum real Latin?
items.answer: Partly. Lorem Ipsum contains real Latin words from Cicero's work, but the text was deliberately scrambled. Words are mixed up, some are missing endings, and others were added. That's why the text makes no sense in Latin - but individual words such as dolor (pain), amet (loves) or ipsum (itself) are genuine Latin words.
items.answerSchemaText: Partly - it contains real Latin words from Cicero, but the text was deliberately scrambled and makes no sense.

items.question: Does Lorem Ipsum mean pain?
items.answer: The opening words point toward pain, but that is not an exact translation. Lorem is the trailing fragment of dolorem (a form of dolor, pain), and ipsum means itself/the same. That's where the playful shorthand dolorem ipsum, pain itself, comes from. This is an interpretation of isolated fragments pulled from a longer, scrambled text, though, not a translation of the whole sentence - which makes no sense in Latin.
items.answerSchemaText: Partly - the opening words relate to dolor (pain) and ipsum (itself), but this is not a full translation.

items.question: How do you pronounce Lorem Ipsum?
items.answer: The text is read the way it's written, breaking words into syllables in classical Latin style: LO-rem IP-sum DO-lor SIT a-MET, con-sec-TE-tur a-di-PIS-cing E-lit. There is no single official pronunciation, since this is not a living language - most people simply read it phonetically, following the standard rules for reading Latin.
items.answerSchemaText: Read phonetically, breaking words into syllables according to classical Latin reading rules: LO-rem IP-sum DO-lor SIT a-MET.

items.question: Can I generate Lorem Ipsum as HTML or a PDF file?
items.answer: The generator produces plain text, with no HTML markup and no PDF export. That is actually convenient when pasting into website code, a JSON test file or an editor, since there is no formatting to strip out. If you need a PDF file, paste the copied text into a text editor (such as Word or Google Docs) and save the document as a PDF.
items.answerSchemaText: No - the generator produces plain text with no HTML markup. For a PDF, paste the text into an editor and save as PDF.

items.question: How many paragraphs of Lorem Ipsum do I need for a page mockup?
items.answer: It depends on the page type. For a landing page, 5-8 paragraphs are usually enough (hero, benefits, social proof, CTA). A service page needs 4-6 paragraphs. A blog article runs 8-15 paragraphs (1,500-2,500 words). A product card needs only 2-3 paragraphs. The generator lets you create exactly the amount you need.
items.answerSchemaText: Depends on the page type: landing page 5-8 paragraphs, service page 4-6, blog article 8-15, product card 2-3.

items.question: Can I use Lorem Ipsum on a live website?
items.answer: No. Lorem Ipsum is intended for the design phase only. Publishing placeholder text on a live website harms SEO (Google classifies it as thin content), negatively affects brand perception, and may get indexed in search results. Always replace placeholder text with real content before publishing.
items.answerSchemaText: No - placeholder text harms SEO and brand perception. Always replace it with real content before publishing.

items.question: What is the difference between Lorem Ipsum and dummy text?
items.answer: They are synonyms. Lorem Ipsum, dummy text, placeholder text, blind text, filler text and sample text - all of these terms describe text used temporarily in place of the final content. Lorem Ipsum is a specific text that traces back to Cicero, while dummy text is a broader term covering any placeholder text.
items.answerSchemaText: They are synonyms - Lorem Ipsum is a specific text from Cicero, while dummy text is a general term for placeholder text.

items.question: What are Hipster Ipsum and Business Ipsum?
items.answer: These are themed variants of placeholder text. Hipster Ipsum uses hipster culture vocabulary (craft, avocado, vintage, mindfulness). Business Ipsum is corporate jargon (synergy, leverage, stakeholder, KPI). Both generate text with a natural rhythm, but with industry-specific vocabulary. They work well in internal presentations where a bit of humour helps team communication.
items.answerSchemaText: Themed Lorem Ipsum variants - Hipster uses lifestyle vocabulary, Business uses corporate jargon.

items.question: Is there an English-language version of Lorem Ipsum?
items.answer: Lorem Ipsum is a Latin phrase, so there is no official English version of it - translating a deliberately scrambled text wouldn't make sense in any language. Our generator does have a dedicated English filler style, though, which uses random English words instead of Latin ones, keeping proportions of word and letter length that feel natural in English. It's the closest equivalent to Lorem Ipsum for an English-language project.
items.answerSchemaText: Lorem Ipsum is in Latin and has no official English version - use the English filler style in the generator instead.

items.question: Is the generator free and safe to use?
items.answer: Yes. The Lorem Ipsum Generator is completely free, with no sign-up and no limits. All text is generated locally in your browser - nothing is sent to a server. The tool does not collect personal data, does not use tracking cookies, and keeps working offline once the page has loaded.
items.answerSchemaText: Yes - free, no sign-up, local browser processing, no data collection.

items.question: How many words does a standard Lorem Ipsum paragraph have?
items.answer: A generated paragraph usually runs 4-7 sentences, around 40-90 words. The classic Lorem Ipsum paragraph available to copy in the section above has about 69 words and starts with Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit.
items.answerSchemaText: A generated paragraph usually runs 4-7 sentences, around 40-90 words.
